project.name: jobbobber
project.description: AI-powered talent matching platform with autonomous agent-to-agent negotiations
project.architecture: Hybrid T3 Stack with Inngest orchestration

ai_ml: ai-sdk-tools (job search, profile retrieval during chat)

database: NOTE: Prisma doesn't have dedicated agent
ai_orchestration: NOTE: Custom agent patterns for LLM integration

build.check: pnpm type-check && pnpm lint && pnpm test

testing.strategy: Test AI agent logic separately from LLM API calls (use mocks)

architecture_notes.type_safety: Full-stack type safety via tRPC + Prisma

agent_architecture.user_facing: Vercel AI SDK with useChat hooks for streaming responses
agent_architecture.tool_calling: AI SDK native tools for job search, profile retrieval during chat
agent_architecture.agent_to_agent: Inngest workflows with OpenAI SDK via AI Gateway
agent_architecture.structured_outputs: Zod schemas + AI SDK streamObject for real-time typed outputs
agent_architecture.philosophy: Minimal abstractions, explicit code, full TypeScript control
agent_architecture.no_langchain: Avoiding heavy frameworks - using Vercel AI SDK + custom logic

ai_gateway.purpose: Unified API for multiple LLM providers with cost control and reliability
features: Unified API - single interface for OpenAI, Anthropic, Cohere, etc.
Budgets - set monthly spending limits per feature/environment
Monitoring - track token usage, costs, latency in Vercel dashboard
Load-balancing - distribute requests across providers to avoid rate limits
Automatic fallbacks - switch to Anthropic if OpenAI is down
Caching - cache repeated evaluations (candidate + job pairs)
benefits: Cost control: Set $500/month budget for MVP phase
Visibility: Track which features cost the most
Multi-provider: Easy to A/B test GPT-4 vs Claude
Rate limit protection: Load-balance when hitting limits

feature_flags.sdk: Vercel Flags SDK for progressive rollout
feature_flags.strategy: Enable features gradually per user cohort (internal → beta → 10% → 100%)
feature_flags.edge_evaluated: Flags evaluated at CDN edge for zero latency

architecture_notes.agent_workflows: Long-running AI conversations handled by Inngest (no timeout limits)
architecture_notes.auth_strategy: Clerk with organization support for employer multi-user teams
architecture_notes.vector_search: pgvector extension in NeonDB (no separate vector DB needed)
architecture_notes.file_storage: Vercel Blob for resumes and documents
architecture_notes.real_time: tRPC subscriptions + Server-Sent Events for match notifications
architecture_notes.deployment: Vercel platform with preview deployments per PR
